message:
chore(fcp-core): regenerate CBOR test vectors

Enrollment and simulate request CBOR vectors updated with fresh
cryptographic key IDs and request UUIDs. Test vector structure and
schema unchanged — only the random values differ from the previous
generation pass.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
